title: Everyone is navigating AI security in real time — even Google
description: We're in the transition period -- all of us.

title: I tried Amazon’s Bee wearable and am both intrigued and slightly creeped out
description: Like other AI wearables, Amazon's Bee offers an odd combination of convenience and privacy anxiety.

title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
description: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.

title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
description: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
description: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
description: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.

title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
description: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.

title: Elon Musk can’t hear you over the sound of his $1.75 trillion IPO
description: The SpaceX S-1 is finally here, and the story it tells goes way further than rockets. The filing runs to 36 pages of risk factors alone, and the numbers inside match the ambition: a $28 trillion total addressable market, a pay package tied to establishing a Mars colony, and a valuation target that would make it the largest IPO in American […]

title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
description: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.

title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
description: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

title: SpaceX files to go public, and the math requires a little faith
description: The SpaceX S-1 is finally here, and the story it tells goes way further than rockets. The filing runs to 36 pages of risk factors alone, and the numbers inside match the ambition: a $28 trillion total addressable market, a pay package tied to establishing a Mars colony, and a valuation target that would make it the largest IPO in American […]

title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
description: Spotify is partnering with Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
description: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
description: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
description: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
description: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets.

title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
description: The AI-powered audiobook generation won't bind authors to an exclusive contract, meaning they are free to publish their generated audiobooks anywhere.

title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
description: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive ‘universal’ AI interface
description: Hark expects to release its first multimodal models this summer, which it says will power a personal AI platform that works with existing products and services. The company expects to follow that with hardware devices built specifically for those systems.

title: Google is pitching an AI agent ecosystem to consumers who may not buy it
description: One of the most promising introductions at Google’s I/O developer conference on Tuesday was a new way for consumers to use the web: AI agents. Unfortunately, it was also the most confusing.
